title: nf-core/antibodyoptimization pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

pdb.errorMessage: PDB file must be provided, cannot contain spaces, and must have extension '.pdb'

chain_heavy.errorMessage: Heavy chain identifier must be a single letter

chain_light.errorMessage: Light chain identifier must be a single letter
